questions.prompt: Which AWS service automatically distributes incoming traffic across multiple targets?
questions.explanation: ELB distributes traffic across multiple instances or containers.

questions.prompt: Which AWS feature allows automatic scaling of EC2 instances based on demand?
questions.explanation: Auto Scaling adjusts capacity automatically to maintain performance.

questions.prompt: Which AWS service provides a global content delivery network?
questions.explanation: CloudFront caches and delivers content globally.

questions.prompt: Which AWS service improves application availability by routing traffic to healthy endpoints?
questions.explanation: Route 53 provides DNS-based routing and health checks.

questions.prompt: Which AWS service provides disaster recovery by replicating workloads across regions?
questions.explanation: CloudEndure Disaster Recovery replicates workloads across regions.

questions.prompt: Which AWS service provides multi-region, multi-active database deployments?
questions.explanation: DynamoDB Global Tables replicate data across regions for HA.

questions.prompt: Which AWS service provides managed message queuing for decoupling applications?
questions.explanation: Amazon SQS is a fully managed message queuing service.

questions.prompt: Which AWS service provides pub/sub messaging for event-driven architectures?
questions.explanation: Amazon SNS is a pub/sub messaging service.

questions.prompt: Which AWS service provides event bus functionality for application integration?
questions.explanation: Amazon EventBridge connects applications using events.

questions.prompt: Which AWS service provides real-time data streaming and analytics?
questions.explanation: Amazon Kinesis ingests and processes real-time streaming data.
